title: Organoid modeling reveals the tumorigenic potential of the alveolar progenitor cell state
author: Jingyun Li
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These are the single-cell multiome data of the Li et al. manuscript. 

 The *_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 files include both RNA and ATAC matrices.
